captures.alt: A freshly booted Commodore 64 screen — light-blue border and dark-blue background with the start-up message and READY prompt — after typing RUN. The bare program does nothing yet.
A completely black screen — the border and background set to black and the start-up text cleared away, leaving a blank canvas.
A single white spaceship sprite — a pointed hull with flared wings — sitting near the bottom centre of an otherwise black screen.
